name: extreme_GC_skew_window
description: 100 kb region with extreme GC-skew: one strand contains 85% A+G (or A+C for AT-skew), the other strand the complement. Models replication-origin proximate regions, mitochondrial-like asymmetry. Stresses strand-aware GC-content modelling.
sources: synthetic, designed as mapper stress test — no biological source
